{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = The Spring of Celestial Starlight
| introduced = cradle-12-waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[The Spring of Celestial Starlight]] nourishes the spirits of Archlords to prepare [[Remnants]] for [[Herald]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c7">''Waybound'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|“The Spring of Celestial Starlight. Nourishes the spirits of Archlords to prepare the Remnants for Herald."<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c7" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
